title: Tunisian Bao Pastries
description: Delicate, flaky pastry wrapped around a sweet and savory bao filling, inspired by Tunisian cuisine.

ingredients.name: Tunisian pastry dough
ingredients.notes: available in most international grocery stores

ingredients.name: Bao filling (see below)
ingredients.notes: sweet and savory mixture of ground meat, onions, and spices

ingredients.name: Delicate flaky pastry
ingredients.notes: for brushing pastry with egg wash

instructions: Roll out pastry dough to 1/4 inch thickness.
Cut into squares, about 3 inches per side.
Place a spoonful of bao filling in the center of each square.
Brush edges with egg wash and fold pastry into triangles.
Seal edges with a fork and brush tops with egg wash.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
